testcase.name: test_aria_chat_streams_and_ends
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_aria_chat.py:42: in test_aria_chat_streams_and_ends raise AssertionError(f"Aria stream error: {obj['error']}") E AssertionError: Aria stream error: { E "error": { E "code": 401, E "message": "Request had invalid authentication credentials. testcase.name: test_status_shape
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_notify_triggers.py:79: in test_status_shape assert d["whatsapp_configured"] is True E assert False is True

testcase.name: test_parse_real_image_shape

failure.message:
AssertionError: OCR call failed: 502 <!DOCTYPE html> <!--[if lt IE 7]> <html class="no-js ie6 oldie" lang="en-US"> <![endif]--> <!--[if IE 7]> <html class="no-js ie7 oldie" lang="en-US"> <![endif]--> <!--[if IE 8]> <html class="no-js ie8 oldie" lang="en-US"> <![endif]--> <!--[if gt IE 8]><!--> <html class="no-js" lang="en-US"> <!--<![endif]--> <head>
<title>preview.emergentagent.com | 502: Bad gateway</title> <meta charset="UT assert 502 == 200 + where 502 = <Response [502]>.status_code

testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_smartsetup_backend.py:108: in test_parse_real_image_shape assert r.status_code == 200, f"OCR call failed: {r.status_code} {r.text[:400]}" E AssertionError: OCR call failed: 502 <!DOCTYPE html> E <!--[if lt IE 7]> <html class="no-js ie6 oldie" lang="en-US"> <![endif]--> E <!--[if IE 7]> <html class="no-js ie7 oldie" lang="en-US"> <![endif]--> E <!--[if IE 8]> <html class="no-js ie8 oldie" lang="en-US"> <![endif]--> E <!--[if gt IE 8]><!--> <html class="no-js" lang="en-US"> <!--<![endif]--> E <head> E E <title>preview.emergentagent.com | 502: Bad gateway</title> E <meta charset="UT E assert 502 == 200 E + where 502 = <Response [502]>.status_code
